parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Package Vod Detail

box "STB" #E0E0E0
participant PackageVodDetail
participant VodProductManager
end box
participant MBS

activate PackageVodDetail
PackageVodDetail -> MBS : get package vod detail infos
activate MBS
MBS --> PackageVodDetail : package vod detail infos
deactivate MBS

PackageVodDetail -> VodProductManager : getProductButtons(productList)
activate VodProductManager
VodProductManager --> PackageVodDetail : product buttons
deactivate VodProductManager

opt getting Push for vod purchased
    MBS -> PackageVodDetail : purchasePush(offerId)
    activate MBS
    deactivate MBS
    
    PackageVodDetail -> MBS : get user discount intofs
    activate MBS
    MBS --> PackageVodDetail : discount/cash coupon, membership point
    deactivate MBS
    
    opt vod product contains offerId
        PackageVodDetail -> MBS : get package vod detail infos
        activate MBS
        MBS --> PackageVodDetail : package vod detail infos
        deactivate MBS
        
        PackageVodDetail -> VodProductManager : getProductButtons(productList)
        activate VodProductManager
        VodProductManager --> PackageVodDetail : product buttons
        deactivate VodProductManager
    end
end
deactivate PackageVodDetail

legend
When entering the single package detail
|= Function |= Interface |= |
| get package vod detail infos | get package vod detail (GET /service/packagedetail) | row |
| get user discounts | get discount infos (GET /service/retrieveowncouponhomeinfo) | row |

When vod is purchased. Getting push message from MBS
|= Function |= value |= |
| purchasePush | offer id | row |
endlegend

@enduml
```
